EV-ERROR.selector: uses one executable vocabulary across API, Job, and diagnostic records

EV-AGENT-INGEST-EVAL.selector: passes deterministic citation, support, recall, language, and review gates

EV-PLAYBOOK.selector: This document is the sole owner of P0-P9 phase numbers

EV-PUBLIC-BUG.selector: Security issues must follow SECURITY.md instead of this public form.

EV-PUBLIC-SECURITY.selector: I need a private channel to share security details.

EV-PHASE-PREFLIGHT.selector: If all items pass, begin Phase 0 only

EV-LICENSE-NOTICE.selector: This product includes software developed for the Pige project.

EV-VAULT-LAYOUT.selector: creates the required readable vault files without storing machine-local absolute paths in the manifest

EV-VAULT-POLICY.selector: keeps source storage policy in vault config and reflects it in the summary

EV-VAULT-RESET.selector: resets only rebuildable database and index roots

EV-SYNC-CONFLICT.selector: uses one stable ID vocabulary and rejects retired aliases

EV-MARKDOWN-ATOMIC.selector: recovers a completed page write after a crash before checksum finalization

EV-SOURCE-PAGE-CONFLICT-PRESERVATION.selector: preserves a user edit that lands after the pending Source Record commit

EV-SOURCE-PAGE-SOURCE-REVISION.selector: preserves a newer Source Record revision detected before pending replacement

EV-SOURCE-PAGE-BASELINE.selector: rejects a stale Source Record baseline before source-page projection begins

EV-SOURCE-PAGE-PATH-PROJECTION.selector: accepts an absolute Source Record path only inside the vault Source Record root

EV-SOURCE-PAGE-PATH-CONFINEMENT.selector: rejects an absolute Source Record path outside the vault Source Record root

EV-SOURCE-PAGE-PREVIEW-BOUNDARY.selector: rejects a symlinked extracted-text preview without leaking external text

EV-SETTINGS.selector: classifies implemented user-visible and agent-affecting settings

EV-LOCAL-SETTINGS.selector: preserves machine-local window preferences when activating a vault

EV-SETTING-GUARD.selector: fails closed for a Permission Broker requirement until a broker decision exists

EV-POLICY.selector: builds a non-secret policy context from vault config

EV-DIAGNOSTICS.selector: exports only bounded redacted local support bundle content

EV-DIAG-PERSISTENCE-SAFETY.selector: replaces opaque top-level diagnostic messages while preserving safe evidence

EV-DIAG-RETENTION.selector: retains non-error events for 14 days and error events for 30 days at exact boundaries

EV-DIAG-ROTATION.selector: repeatedly rotates within one total budget and preserves the newest useful evidence

EV-TOOLCHAIN.selector: reports needs_repair when required bundled tools are missing

EV-PROVIDER.selector: stores provider metadata and discovered model profiles without writing raw API keys to profile files

EV-RUNTIME.selector: becomes ready without resolving credential-bearing runtime configuration

EV-RUNTIME-NONSECRET-BINDING.selector: checks the selected runtime binding by secret reference without decrypting credentials

EV-JOB-NONSECRET-READINESS.selector: schedules Agent ingest readiness without resolving runtime credentials

EV-CAPTURE.selector: preserves text capture as a managed source, source record, conversation event, and queued job

EV-LARGE-PASTE.selector: stores large pasted text once and references it from conversation history

EV-FILE-CAPTURE.selector: preserves dropped Markdown files as managed source copies without duplicating file bodies in conversation history

EV-DOCUMENT-CAPTURE.selector: preserves document and image files as managed sources for later parser or OCR work

EV-JOB-RECOVERY.selector: recovers a parent crash after durable child handoff without duplicating the child

EV-JOB-WAIT.selector: creates a waiting Agent ingest job when no default model is ready

EV-JOB-CANCEL.selector: cancels running image OCR before durable output and clears retry orchestration state

EV-JOB-DURABLE-CANCEL.selector: protects durable partial outputs across failure, dependency wait, retry, and cooperative cancellation

EV-CAPTURE-PUBLICATION-GUARD.selector: persists the capture guard before the first projection write and keeps it after restart

EV-AGENT-PUBLICATION-CANCEL.selector: preserves a verified Agent note when cancellation races its create-only commit

EV-JOB-DRAIN.selector: continues beyond one batch while yielding between bounded batches

EV-MARKDOWN.selector: parses the known top-level fields used by library summaries

EV-AGENT-INGEST.selector: turns a preserved source into a wiki note, index entry, and operation record without storing prompts or secrets

EV-PI-RUNTIME-BOUNDARY.selector: Pi runtime boundary OK: one contained adapter owns official Pi imports, isolated auth/models, and sequential Pige tools.

EV-GENERATED-NOTE-FINAL-FENCE.selector: requeues Agent ingest when SourceRecord changes at the final note commit fence

EV-GENERATED-NOTE-CONFLICT-PRESERVATION.selector: preserves a user page created while the model call is running

EV-UNTRUSTED-SOURCE-BOUNDARY.selector: keeps URL, PDF, Office, and image-OCR instructions inside the evidence boundary

EV-UNTRUSTED-OUTPUT-SCHEMA.selector: rejects model-authored control-plane and destination fields before generated-note writes

EV-LOW-CONFIDENCE.selector: marks low-confidence or warning-bearing generated notes as needing review

EV-SAFE-AUTO-APPLY.selector: turns a preserved source into a wiki note, index entry, and operation record without storing prompts or secrets

EV-EGRESS.selector: enforces fail-safe model-egress outcomes from boundary, policy, and content class

EV-EGRESS-SERVICE.selector: requires an egress decision before credential lookup or model invocation

EV-EGRESS-PROFILE-BINDING.selector: rejects a same-ID provider endpoint change before prompt rendering or credential lookup

EV-EGRESS-RUNTIME-BINDING.selector: rejects a same-ID runtime endpoint or model change before model invocation

EV-LIBRARY.selector: lists pages through the local database index when available

EV-DB-REBUILD.selector: rebuilds after database deletion without losing Markdown knowledge

EV-INDEX-REBUILD-WORKER.selector: cooperatively cancels a running index worker without changing durable Markdown

EV-DB-EXTERNAL-EDIT.selector: detects external Markdown edits and refreshes the FTS index

EV-DB-LINKS.selector: indexes wiki links and local Markdown links as rebuildable related pages

EV-KNOWLEDGE-TREE-AGGREGATE.selector: rebuilds an explainable domain, topic, concept, and source tree from durable Markdown

EV-DB-DRIVER.selector: initializes the node sqlite migration state behind the driver abstraction

EV-READER-RELATED.selector: returns related pages through the local database without exposing note bodies

EV-CJK.selector: uses CJK-friendly character grams instead of whitespace-only matching

EV-RETRIEVAL.selector: answers from bounded local evidence with citations and ranked pages

EV-RETRIEVAL-REGRESSION-GOLDEN.selector: passes deterministic ranking, citation, distractor, related-page, and insufficient-evidence gates

EV-CONTEXT.selector: serializes context-pack refs and budgets without selected snippet bodies

EV-PARSER.selector: reuses verified artifacts and regenerates an artifact whose checksum changed

EV-PARSER-SMOKE.selector: Built document and web parser workers loaded and returned valid protocol responses.

EV-LOCAL-TOOL-LIFECYCLE-FOUNDATION.selector: installs an explicit local fixture and derives a ready capability without network access

EV-DOCUMENT-PIPELINE.selector: parses preserved DOCX and PPTX files into verified artifacts before OCR and Agent handoff

EV-PPTX-EMBEDDED-MEDIA-OCR.selector: delays PPTX Agent ingest until selected embedded media completes local OCR

EV-OCR.selector: persists image OCR artifacts, refreshes the source page, and reuses validated output after recovery

EV-MIXED-PDF-OCR.selector: delays Agent ingest until sparse mixed-PDF pages join native evidence

EV-VERIFIED-INPUT-SNAPSHOT.selector: copies bytes into a private checksum-bound snapshot and applies POSIX read-only mode

EV-PDF-PARSER-INPUT-SNAPSHOT.selector: runs a referenced PDF through parser artifacts and Agent ingest without a managed copy

EV-OFFICE-PARSER-INPUT-SNAPSHOT.selector: binds Office extraction to a private snapshot across a live pathname replacement

EV-PDF-OCR-WRITE-CONTAINMENT.selector: rejects rendered-page writes through a parent symlink outside the vault

EV-PDF-OCR-SOURCE-REVISION.selector: rejects a detected Source Record update before final OCR replacement

EV-PDF-RENDER-GENERATION.selector: records incomplete and completed render generations without reusing stale provenance

EV-PARSE-FOLLOWUP-DURABILITY.selector: persists parse follow-up jobs before the parent can leave its recoverable state

EV-OCR-FOLLOWUP-DURABILITY.selector: persists Agent follow-up before an OCR parent can leave its recoverable state

EV-WAITING-AGENT-REQUEUE.selector: requeues waiting Agent ingest jobs after a default model becomes ready

EV-OCR-NATIVE-FALLBACK.selector: releases verified native PDF text when OCR becomes unavailable after parsing

EV-AGENT-EVIDENCE-REVISION.selector: requeues Agent ingest when OCR changes the evidence during a model call

EV-PDF-REFERENCE-ORIGINAL.selector: keeps empty OCR body-free and supports a referenced original PDF

EV-PROPOSAL.selector: stages durable proposals and lists safe summaries without proposed content

EV-BACKUP.selector: creates a zip backup with durable vault files and restores it into a new vault without rebuildable cache files

EV-BACKUP-DURABLE-COVERAGE.selector: body-free path-safe manifest aligned with ZIP entries

EV-RESTORE-CONFLICT.selector: flags checksum mismatches during restore preview and blocks restore apply

EV-I18N.selector: keeps every v0.1 locale populated with the same keys

EV-RENDERER.selector: sanitizes raw HTML and renders Pige inline references as safe anchors

EV-PRIVACY-POLICY.selector: Pige does not run product analytics

EV-DESKTOP-SETTING-GUARD.selector: guards sensitive settings in the main process before mutation
